Please Provide Results Files:
Run the policy and evaluation script, instructions are here to obtain .csv files or a zip of them.

Please Answer the following questions:
policy name?
authors/institution name?
multi-task?
data type (real/sim/mix)?
robot generalist?
data opensourced?
model opensourced?
source link?
model type (if applicable), (eg. vla, wam, bm, vlm)?
embodiment?
action space?
no. of params?
data released
chunk size (if applicable)?
context length (if applicable)?
